name: jovida-daily
title: Jovida Daily
description: Capture and manage your Jovida Daily todos — and let Raycast AI do it for you.
author: AidenZ

commands.name: my-todos
commands.title: My Todos
commands.subtitle: Jovida Daily
commands.description: Browse, search, complete, and manage your Jovida todos.

commands.name: add-todo
commands.title: Add Todo
commands.subtitle: Jovida Daily
commands.description: Quickly create a new Jovida todo.

commands.name: today-menubar
commands.title: Menu Bar Todos
commands.subtitle: Jovida Daily
commands.description: Show upcoming (today and later) pending todos in the macOS menu bar.

tools.name: get-todos
tools.title: Get Todos
tools.description: List, search, and filter the user's Jovida todos. Use this first to read current todos and get their entry_id before updating, completing, or deleting. Defaults to today's pending todos. Works with multilingual queries; preserve the user's language in text fields.

tools.name: view-todo
tools.title: View Todo
tools.description: Get full details for one Jovida todo, recurring todo, or occurrence: description, subtasks with ids/indexes, reminders, reminder channels, and repeat rule. Use before precise subtask edits.

tools.name: create-todo
tools.title: Create Todo
tools.description: Create a single ONE-OFF Jovida todo (cannot repeat). Use for every normal task, including ones with a date, deadline, or reminder/alarm. Resolve relative dates from the user's local timezone/locale and pass either YYYY-MM-DD or ISO datetime with offset. For a routine the user explicitly asks to repeat, use Create Recurring Todo instead.

tools.name: create-recurring-todo
tools.title: Create Recurring Todo
tools.description: Create a REPEATING Jovida todo (a routine on a schedule). Use ONLY when the user explicitly asks for repetition like 'every day', 'each Monday', 'weekly', '每天', or '每周一'. Never use for a one-off task that just has a date or a reminder.

tools.name: update-todo
tools.title: Update Todo
tools.description: Change fields of an existing Jovida todo (title, due time, priority, category, description, subtasks, reminders). Only the fields you pass change. For individual subtask check/uncheck/add/remove, use Subtask Todo instead. Get the entry_id from get-todos first — never guess it.

tools.name: subtask-todo
tools.title: Subtask Todo
tools.description: Check, uncheck, add, or remove subtasks without replacing the whole list. Use view-todo first when you need subtask ids or indexes.

tools.name: complete-todo
tools.title: Complete Todo
tools.description: Mark one or more Jovida todos as done. Reversible. Get the entry_id from get-todos first.

tools.name: delete-todo
tools.title: Delete Todo
tools.description: Permanently delete one or more Jovida todos. This is NOT reversible — there is no undo. Prefer complete-todo unless the item was never real. To stop a routine, delete its recurring_id; a single un-materialized occurrence cannot be deleted. Get the entry_id from get-todos first.
